message:
feat(tui): add sprint action commands and suggested next work

Sprint detail pane now shows actionable commands at the bottom:
- 'Claim next' command template (br update <id> --status=in_progress)
- 'Close issue' command template (br close <id> --reason "done")
- 'Suggested' next item (first open issue in the sprint)

This gives operators immediate guidance on what to do next within a
sprint context without leaving the TUI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
